perturbation.original_text: 2.1 This Agreement shall be effective from the date first above written and shall continue indefinitely until terminated by either Party in accordance with the provisions of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: 2.1 This Agreement shall be effective from the date first above written and shall continue for a period of one (1) year, automatically renewing for additional one (1) year terms, unless terminated by either Party in accordance with the provisions of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction regarding the term of the agreement. Originally, the agreement continues 'indefinitely,' but the modified text specifies a one-year term with automatic renewal. This creates uncertainty about the agreement's duration and renewal process. It contradicts Section 19.1 which allows for termination without cause after two years.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 19.1 Either Party may terminate this Agreement, without cause, by giving two (2) years written notice.
perturbation.justification: The original text states the agreement continues 'indefinitely'. The changed text modifies this to a one-year term with automatic renewal, creating a direct contradiction. Section 19.1 allows for termination without cause after two years; however, the automatically renewing one-year term now conflicts with this two-year notice period for termination, creating uncertainty and a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 3.9 Dynamex agrees not to provide sameday delivery services for any other provider of next day or multiple day courier services. It is understood and agreed that Dynamex, from time to time and upon request, may provide pick-up and/or delivery services for other next-day or multiple day courier service providers, as part of their next-day and multiple day service commitment, provided Dynamex' services will not result in the provision of same day service to the customer of the provider of next-day or multiple day courier service. Dynamex may continue to provide the same day service it currently provides to Alltours customers, provided revenue to Dynamex from this business does not exceed Five Thousand Dollars ($5,000.00) per month provided there is no change in control, direct or indirect, in Alltours.
perturbation.changed_text: 3.9 Dynamex may provide sameday delivery services for any provider of next day or multiple day courier services. It is understood and agreed that Dynamex, from time to time and upon request, may provide pick-up and/or delivery services for other next-day or multiple day courier service providers, as part of their next-day and multiple day service commitment, provided Dynamex' services will not result in the provision of same day service to the customer of the provider of next-day or multiple day courier service. Dynamex may continue to provide the same day service it currently provides to Alltours customers, provided revenue to Dynamex from this business does not exceed Five Thousand Dollars ($5,000.00) per month provided there is no change in control, direct or indirect, in Alltours.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction by stating Dynamex 'may' provide sameday delivery services for other providers, whereas originally Dynamex 'agrees not to' provide such services. While Dynamex can provide pick-up and/or delivery services if it's part of next-day or multiple day commitment, the permission to provide *sameday* delivery directly conflicts with that provision.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 3.9 Dynamex may provide sameday delivery services for any provider of next day or multiple day courier services. It is understood and agreed that Dynamex, from time to time and upon request, may provide pick-up and/or delivery services for other next-day or multiple day courier service providers, as part of their next-day and multiple day service commitment, provided Dynamex' services will not result in the provision of same day service to the customer of the provider of next-day or multiple day courier service. Dynamex may continue to provide the same day service it currently provides to Alltours customers, provided revenue to Dynamex from this business does not exceed Five Thousand Dollars ($5,000.00) per month provided there is no change in control, direct or indirect, in Alltours.
perturbation.justification: The original text in section 3.9 stated that 'Dynamex agrees not to provide sameday delivery services for any other provider of next day or multiple day courier services.' The changed text in the same section now states that 'Dynamex may provide sameday delivery services for any provider of next day or multiple day courier services.' This is a direct contradiction within the same section of the contract, as 'agrees not to' and 'may' are mutually exclusive, causing a structural flaw that introduces a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 17.2 Upon the occurrence of an Event of Default and in addition to any rights or remedies available to it under this Agreement or at law or in equity, the Party not in default may exercise any or all of the following remedies: (a) terminate this Agreement, upon giving one hundred and twenty (120) days written notice, otherwise upon written notice with respect to 17.1 (g) and (h); (b) recover from the defaulting Party any and all monies then due and to become due; and (c) take possession, immediately, without demand or notice, without any court order or other process of law, any and all of its property (including bags and containers) and Freight received by the defaulting Party under this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: 17.2 Upon the occurrence of an Event of Default and in addition to any rights or remedies available to it under this Agreement or at law or in equity, the Party not in default may exercise some of the following remedies: (a) terminate this Agreement, only upon giving two hundred and forty (240) days written notice, otherwise upon written notice with respect to 17.1 (g) and (h); (b) recover from the defaulting Party any and all monies then due and to become due; and (c) take possession, immediately, without demand or notice, without any court order or other process of law, any and all of its property (including bags and containers) and Freight received by the defaulting Party under this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: The modification in section 17.2 alters the remedies available to the non-defaulting party by contradicting the section itself. Initially, the section states that the non-defaulting party may exercise 'any or all' of the remedies. However, the introduction of 'some' contradicts this, creating ambiguity and contradicting also the clause (a), which before was 'one hundred and twenty (120) days' which have been changed to 'two hundred and forty (240) days written notice', contradicting the intention of the parties about how to proceed on the term of the termination
perturbation.contradicted_text: 17.2 Upon the occurrence of an Event of Default and in addition to any rights or remedies available to it under this Agreement or at law or in equity, the Party not in default may exercise some of the following remedies: (a) terminate this Agreement, only upon giving two hundred and forty (240) days written notice, otherwise upon written notice with respect to 17.1 (g) and (h); (b) recover from the defaulting Party any and all monies then due and to become due; and (c) take possession, immediately, without demand or notice, without any court order or other process of law, any and all of its property (including bags and containers) and Freight received by the defaulting Party under this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a contradiction by changing 'any or all' to 'some'. This limits the options available to the non-defaulting party in a way that conflicts with the initial broad grant of remedies. Additionally, the change from 'one hundred and twenty (120) days' to 'two hundred and forty (240) days' for termination notice directly contradicts the previously agreed-upon timeframe, creating a strong inconsistency. This makes the Contradicted Text an in-text contradiction.
